All right, Gemlaunchers, now that we've got our acuity scheduler set up, we can go ahead and place it inside of our ClickFunnel. So I highly suggest that you click on the file button of this and you make a copy. And then with that copy, name that copy after your Gem so that you have something to reference. I've already done this. So I'm going to go ahead and open that up for us. So Sabrina's Gem, CF to acuity. So we're going to start by editing the thank you page code and just get the hard part out of the way. So let's start with our hashtag. In order to get our hashtag code, we're going to go ahead and go back to our ClickFunnel. We're going to go to the thank you page. And once we're there, we're going to click Edit Page. From the Edit Page section, we're going to scroll down and click on custom JavaScript slash HTML. This is going to have a little area with a hashtag that says get CSS info. When we click on that, we're just going to need the code in the CSS ID selector section. So I'm going to go ahead and copy this right here. I'm going to go back to my page and paste it. The next thing that I'm going to need to do is get our acuity embed code. So in order to locate that, when you're in your acuity, it may look a little bit something like this to start. So you're going to scroll down under Client Scheduling Page and click on Scheduling Page Link. From here, we'll scroll down again. And since we have multiple appointment types and possibly multiple calendars, we're going to do something other than select our general scheduling page. So for me, I only have one calendar. You could show your whole calendar, but since I only have one, I'd rather just show my one appointment type that I'm going to be offering. So for me, that'll be consultation. Yours might say orientation. I'm going to go ahead and choose that. And then I'm going to click on Embed Scheduler. From here, this is going to give me the two parts of my embed code. So the first part that I need is this portion here that looks kind of like a website. When I get this code, I'm going to be super careful to make sure that I do not copy those two parentheses. That way, I don't mess up my code on the thank you page. So right here, I'm going to paste my code. And now we can go get the second part. So the second part of our acuity embed code is going to go right here. And it's going to be the next portion that looks like a website. So the next portion that starts with the HTTPS. I'm going to make extra sure that I don't get anything other than the code. I'm going to copy it. And I'm going to paste it on over here. So that is as much code writing as you're going to have to do. So let's go ahead and hook it up. So this first portion up here, the opt-in page code, is going to go on our first page. You're going to use, you're going to hear the words opt-in, squeeze page, or landing page used intermittently between all of us. And that all means the same thing. So since we're in our thank you page right now, I'm going to go on ahead and back out so that we can go to our first page. So our landing page. Once we're up here, we're going to click edit page. And we're going to place that first portion of our code. So in order to do that, we're going to go to settings right here, tracking code, footer code, and then we're going to scroll down beneath all the code that is already placed in here, underneath the portion where it says script, and we're going to place our code. All we have to do after this is click out of the box and hit the save button twice. And now we can move on over and do our second part. So the second part is going to go on our thank you page. So we're going to head back over there. We're going to click that edit page button. And we're going to travel down to where it says custom JavaScript HTML again.
